user.title: Connect to Alula
user.description: Sign in with your Alula account to control your alarm panel.

data_description.username: The email address you use to sign in to the Alula app.
data_description.panel_id: Optional. Only needed if your account has multiple panels. You can find this in the Alula app under device settings.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Alula API. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Alula account is already configured.
